creator: eric.douzet@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

With the Package gnupg-2.0.14_3 the dependence from libassuan library
is in version 1-1.0.5. This library has just been updated in version
libassuan-2.0.0. That generates an error of compilation. I think that
it is a little oversight of your part...

My list from installation Packages is visible at this address:

http://www.c-extra.com/en/freebsd-server.php

Very cordially, in advance thank you,

Eric Douzet
